sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41093" key="e)pistrw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστρώννῡμι</orth> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ύω,</foreign> <sense id="n41093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπιστορέννυμι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
